headline: Con Edison (ED) Stock Looks Fairly Valued At Current Levels
summary: Consolidated Edison stock has delivered a strong 85.2% return over the last 5 years, yet its current checks paint a more cautious picture, with the Dividend Discount Model (DDM) suggesting the share price is roughly in line with its intrinsic value even as market multiples hint at some undervaluation. An 85.2% return over 5 years highlights that long term holders in Consolidated Edison have already seen substantial gains, so the bar for new value upside is higher. Recent attention on grid...
